summary: CSV Parser Coinbase format tests complete. All new tests pass. Modern Coinbase format (Transaction ID, Date & time, Asset Acquired/Sold, Quantity Acquired/Sold, USD Value) correctly detected and parsed. Classic format (Timestamp, Transaction Type, Asset, Quantity Transacted) working. Buy/sell detection logic verified - buying crypto with USD/stablecoins = 'buy', selling crypto for USD/stablecoins = 'sell'. API endpoints /api/exchanges/supported and /api/exchanges/export-instructions/{exchange} both return accepted_columns field.

success_rate.backend: 100% (41/41 tests passed - 21 new CSV parser tests + 20 existing exchange tests)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (20/20 exchange spec tests passed including 3 new accepted_columns tests)

seed_data_creation: Test users created dynamically with unique timestamps
context_for_next_testing_agent: CSV parser fix for Coinbase formats verified. Created test_csv_parser.py with 21 tests covering: format detection (classic, modern, heuristic), parsing (buy/sell/multiple transactions), buy/sell logic (crypto acquired = buy, crypto sold = sell, stablecoin handling), API endpoints (accepted_columns in /exchanges/supported and /exchanges/export-instructions), edge cases (empty CSV, unknown format, missing values, timestamp formats). All tests pass.
features_verified: CSV Parser: Modern Coinbase format detection (Transaction ID, Date & time, Asset Acquired, Quantity Acquired, Asset Sold, Quantity Sold, USD Value)
CSV Parser: Classic Coinbase format detection (Timestamp, Transaction Type, Asset, Quantity Transacted)
CSV Parser: Buy/sell detection - acquiring crypto with USD/stablecoins = 'buy'
CSV Parser: Buy/sell detection - selling crypto for USD/stablecoins = 'sell'
CSV Parser: Stablecoin handling (USDC, USDT, BUSD, DAI treated like USD)
API: GET /api/exchanges/supported returns accepted_columns for each exchange
API: GET /api/exchanges/export-instructions/{exchange} returns accepted_columns for Coinbase
API: Coinbase shows both classic and modern format descriptions in accepted_columns

backend.test_csv_parser.py: 21 passed - NEW CSV parser tests for Coinbase format fix

frontend.exchange.spec.ts: 20 passed - including 3 new tests for accepted_columns feature
